title: Test local omendb dev in omengrep
description: Switch omengrep to the local omendb development checkout, run build/tests, and document any integration issues.

logs.msg: Inspected omengrep state: Cargo.toml currently uses crates.io omendb 0.0.30. Searching local filesystem for omendb checkout before switching dependency.
Located local omendb checkout at /Users/nick/github/omendb/omendb and updated ai/STATUS.md before implementation.

Confirmed local omendb 0.0.32 API is compatible on paper (VectorStore::open, multi_vector_with, persist, query_with_options, search_multi_with_text, get_metadata_by_id). Switching dependency to path checkout for validation.
Validation succeeded with local omendb path dependency: cargo test passed (34 tests), cargo build --release passed. No omengrep code changes required beyond dependency wiring and STATUS update.
User indicated the omendb dev release should now be published. Verifying crates.io availability before removing the local path dependency and revalidating omengrep.
Confirmed omendb 0.0.32 is on crates.io. Switching omengrep from local path dependency back to the published crate for final validation.
Published omendb 0.0.32 validation: cargo test passed (34 tests). Running real og build/search/status smoke test against the registry crate.
Published omendb 0.0.32 is in use now. omengrep switched back to registry dependency, passed cargo test (34 tests), and passed og build/search/status smoke tests. Session state saved to ai/STATUS.md.
